array_of_attachment_info_position_name_s: Array of attachment info (position, name, size)
array_of_record_ids_matching_the_where_c: Array of record IDs matching the WHERE clause
array_of_saved_search_definitions_name_l: Array of saved search definitions (name, label, id, description)
attachment_field_name_or_choice_field_na: Attachment field name or choice field name
choice_value_to_resolve_to_its_line_id: Choice value to resolve to its line ID
create_a_new_contract_or_related_record_: Create a new contract or related record in Agiloft from provided deal or request details.
id_of_the_record_the_file_operation_was: ID of the record the file operation was performed on
integrate_with_agiloft_contract_lifecycl: Integrate with Agiloft contract lifecycle management to create, read, update, delete, and search records. Supports file attachments, SQL-based selection, saved searches, and record locking across any table in your knowledge base.
internal_numeric_id_of_the_resolved_choi: Internal numeric ID of the resolved choice value
number_of_attachments_remaining_after_re: Number of attachments remaining after removal
optional_name_for_the_attached_file: Optional name for the attached file
query_agiloft_for_contracts_approaching_: Query Agiloft for contracts approaching their renewal or expiration date and report the ones at risk.
read_a_contract_record_in_agiloft_and_pr: Read a contract record in Agiloft and produce a plain-language summary of its key obligations and dates.
total_number_of_files_attached_in_the_fi: Total number of files attached in the field
username_of_the_user_who_locked_the_reco: Username of the user who locked the record
